query:
SELECT u.username, st.name as tier_name, st.monthlyPrice, st.maxVehicles 
FROM `userSubscriptions` us 
JOIN `users` u ON us.userId = u.id 
JOIN `subscriptionTiers` st ON us.tierId = st.id 
WHERE u.username = 'test11';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute SELECT u.username, st.name as tier_name, st.monthlyPrice, st.maxVehicles 
FROM `userSubscriptions` us 
JOIN `users` u ON us.userId = u.id 
JOIN `subscriptionTiers` st ON us.tierId = st.id 
WHERE u.username = 'test11';
stdout:
username	tier_name	monthlyPrice	maxVehicles
test11	Starter	50	15
